perturbation.original_text: 5. Return or Destruction of Evaluation Material . If you decide that you do not wish to proceed with a possible Transaction, you will promptly inform the Company of this decision. In that case, or at any time upon the written request of the Company for any reason, you will, and will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives to, within ten (10) days after the request, destroy or return all Evaluation Material and no copy, extract, or other reproductions thereof (including electronic copies) shall be retained. No such termination will affect your obligations hereunder or those of the Representatives. If requested by the Company, you will, and will cause the Representatives to, provide written certification to the Company that all such material (including electronic copies) has been returned or destroyed in compliance with this Confidentiality Agreement. Notwithstanding the return or destruction of the Evaluation Material, you and the Representatives shall continue to be bound by their obligations of confidentiality and other obligations hereunder.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. Return or Destruction of Evaluation Material . If you decide that you do not wish to proceed with a possible Transaction, you will promptly inform the Company of this decision. In that case, or at any time upon the written request of the Company for any reason, you will, and will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives to, within ten (10) days after the request, destroy or return all Evaluation Material, to the extent feasible, and no copy, extract, or other reproductions thereof (including electronic copies) shall be retained. No such termination will affect your obligations hereunder or those of the Representatives. If requested by the Company, you will, and will cause the Representatives to, provide written certification to the Company that all such material (including electronic copies) has been returned or destroyed in compliance with this Confidentiality Agreement. Notwithstanding the return or destruction of the Evaluation Material, you and the Representatives shall continue to be bound by their obligations of confidentiality and other obligations hereunder.
perturbation.explanation: The addition of the phrase 'to the extent feasible' introduces ambiguity regarding the obligation to destroy or return Evaluation Material. The original text requires complete destruction or return within ten days. The modified version suggests that compliance is only required when 'feasible', potentially contradicting the requirement to return all evaluation material. This undermines the confidentiality, by setting in text contradictory meanings.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5. Return or Destruction of Evaluation Material . If you decide that you do not wish to proceed with a possible Transaction, you will promptly inform the Company of this decision. In that case, or at any time upon the written request of the Company for any reason, you will, and will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives to, within ten (10) days after the request, destroy or return all Evaluation Material, to the extent feasible, and no copy, extract, or other reproductions thereof (including electronic copies) shall be retained. No such termination will affect your obligations hereunder or those of the Representatives. If requested by the Company, you will, and will cause the Representatives to, provide written certification to the Company that all such material (including electronic copies) has been returned or destroyed in compliance with this Confidentiality Agreement. Notwithstanding the return or destruction of the Evaluation Material, you and the Representatives shall continue to be bound by their obligations of confidentiality and other obligations hereunder.
perturbation.justification: The original text mandates complete destruction or return of Evaluation Material within ten days. The changed text adds 'to the extent feasible,' which introduces ambiguity and allows for incomplete destruction or return. This directly contradicts the original obligation and undermines the confidentiality as it is no longer an absolute requirement. The Contradicted Text is the same as the Changed Text, and the change in text introduces ambiguity regarding the obligation to destroy or return Evaluation Material.

perturbation.original_text: 8. Not a Transaction Agreement . You understand and agree that no contract or agreement providing for a Transaction shall be deemed to exist between you and the Company unless and until you and the Company execute and deliver a final definitive agreement relating to a Transaction (a “ Transaction Agreement ”), and you hereby waive, in advance, any claims (including, without limitation, breach of contract) relating to the existence of a Transaction unless and until you and the Company shall have executed and delivered a Transaction Agreement. You also agree that, unless and until you and the Company shall have executed and delivered a Transaction Agreement, neither you nor the Company will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to such Transaction by virtue of this Confidentiality Agreement except for the matters specifically agreed to herein. You further acknowledge and agree that the Company reserves the right, in its sole discretion, to reject any proposals made by you, your Affiliates or any of the Representatives with regard to a Transaction, and to terminate discussion and negotiations with you at any time and for any reason or no reason. You understand that the Company shall be free to establish and change any process or procedure with respect to any possible Transaction as the Company in its sole discretion shall determine (including, without limitation, negotiating with any other interested party and entering into a final definitive agreement relating to a Transaction with any other party without prior notice to you or any other Person).
perturbation.changed_text: 8. Not a Transaction Agreement . You understand and agree that a preliminary, non-binding agreement providing for a Transaction shall be deemed to exist between you and the Company, even before you and the Company execute and deliver a final definitive agreement relating to a Transaction (a “ Transaction Agreement ”), and you hereby do not waive, in advance, any claims (including, without limitation, breach of contract) relating to the existence of a Transaction before you and the Company shall have executed and delivered a Transaction Agreement. You also agree that, unless and until you and the Company shall have executed and delivered a Transaction Agreement, neither you nor the Company will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to such Transaction by virtue of this Confidentiality Agreement except for the matters specifically agreed to herein. You further acknowledge and agree that the Company reserves the right, in its sole discretion, to reject any proposals made by you, your Affiliates or any of the Representatives with regard to a Transaction, and to terminate discussion and negotiations with you at any time and for any reason or no reason. You understand that the Company shall be free to establish and change any process or procedure with respect to any possible Transaction as the Company in its sole discretion shall determine (including, without limitation, negotiating with any other interested party and entering into a final definitive agreement relating to a Transaction with any other party without prior notice to you or any other Person).
perturbation.explanation: By changing the initial clauses of Section 8, it creates an in-text conflict. Specifically the changes: 'no contract or agreement providing for a Transaction shall be deemed to exist between you and the Company unless and until you and the Company execute and deliver a final definitive agreement' is changed to 'a preliminary, non-binding agreement providing for a Transaction shall be deemed to exist between you and the Company, even before you and the Company execute and deliver a final definitive agreement'. And 'you hereby waive, in advance, any claims (including, without limitation, breach of contract) relating to the existence of a Transaction unless and until you and the Company shall have executed and delivered a Transaction Agreement.' being changed to 'you hereby do not waive, in advance, any claims (including, without limitation, breach of contract) relating to the existence of a Transaction before you and the Company shall have executed and delivered a Transaction Agreement.' Now contradicts the original statement by suggesting some agreement does exist even before a definitive agreement is signed, and one does not waive any claims ahead of the agreement, This leads to potential disputes regarding preliminary agreements and breach of contract prior to a definitive agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 8. Not a Transaction Agreement . You understand and agree that a preliminary, non-binding agreement providing for a Transaction shall be deemed to exist between you and the Company, even before you and the Company execute and deliver a final definitive agreement relating to a Transaction (a “ Transaction Agreement ”), and you hereby do not waive, in advance, any claims (including, without limitation, breach of contract) relating to the existence of a Transaction before you and the Company shall have executed and delivered a Transaction Agreement. You also agree that, unless and until you and the Company shall have executed and delivered a Transaction Agreement, neither you nor the Company will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to such Transaction by virtue of this Confidentiality Agreement except for the matters specifically agreed to herein. You further acknowledge and agree that the Company reserves the right, in its sole discretion, to reject any proposals made by you, your Affiliates or any of the Representatives with regard to a Transaction, and to terminate discussion and negotiations with you at any time and for any reason or no reason. You understand that the Company shall be free to establish and change any process or procedure with respect to any possible Transaction as the Company in its sole discretion shall determine (including, without limitation, negotiating with any other interested party and entering into a final definitive agreement relating to a Transaction with any other party without prior notice to you or any other Person).
perturbation.justification: The changed text in Section 8 introduces a clear contradiction. The original text states that no agreement exists until a final definitive agreement is signed and waives claims before that agreement. The changed text states that a preliminary, non-binding agreement *does* exist even before the final agreement and that claims *are not* waived. This directly contradicts the original intention of Section 8 and creates ambiguity about the legal obligations of both parties before a final agreement is signed, leading to a strong in-text contradiction and triggering the same section.

perturbation.original_text: 12. Term . Unless explicitly stated otherwise herein, this Confidentiality Agreement will terminate two (2) years from the date hereof and be governed by Texas law.
perturbation.changed_text: 12. Term . Unless explicitly stated otherwise herein, this Confidentiality Agreement will terminate two (2) years from the date hereof, unless otherwise agreed, and be governed by Texas law.
perturbation.explanation: By adding the phrase 'unless otherwise agreed', it allows for a potentially indefinite extension of this confidentiality agreement. This is in text conflict with original clause which states that the the agreement will terminate after 2 years, regardless. Now there can be an extension, thus a contradiction in terms.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 12. Term . Unless explicitly stated otherwise herein, this Confidentiality Agreement will terminate two (2) years from the date hereof, unless otherwise agreed, and be governed by Texas law.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that the Confidentiality Agreement will terminate two years from the date hereof. The changed text introduces 'unless otherwise agreed', creating an ambiguity. This directly contradicts the original fixed termination date, as now the agreement's duration is uncertain and potentially indefinite, causing an in-text contradiction as defined by the prompt.
